abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Brotherhood Terminator Squad
■ Paladin Squad

abilities.name: Hammerhand (Psychic)
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [Lethal Hits] ability.

abilities.name: Eye of Judgement (Psychic)
abilities.description: Each time this model makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Paragon of Sanctity
abilities.description: **^^Grey Knights^^** model only. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can select one friendly **^^Grey Knights^^** unit within 18" of and visible to it. If it does, until the end of the phase, that unit is within your army’s Hallowed Ground.

abilities.name: Phial of the Abyss
abilities.description: **^^Grey Knights Infantry^^** model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Stealth ability.

abilities.name: Mandulian Reliquary
abilities.description: **^^Grey Knights^^** model only. While the bearer’s unit is not Battle‑shocked, add 3 to the bearer’s Objective Control characteristic.

abilities.name: Radiant Champion
abilities.description: **^^Grey Knights Infantry^^** model only. The bearer’s melee weapons have the [^^**Precision**^^] ability, and while the bearer is wholly within your army’s Hallowed Ground, each time a melee attack made by the bearer scores a wound, the target of that attack suffers 1 mortal wound in addition to any normal damage.

abilities.name: Eye of the Augurium
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. Once per battle round, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, you can target the bearer's unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem or Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this turn.

abilities.name: Sanctic Reaper
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights Terminator^^** model only. Add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons.

abilities.name: Inescapable Judgement (Psychic)
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only.  Each time an enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit Falls Back, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds. These mortal wounds are Psychic Attacks.

abilities.name: Nemesis Rounds
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights Terminator^^** model only.  Each time you target the bearer's unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ while resolving that Stratagem.

abilities.name: Sigil of Exigence
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. Once per battle, in your opponent's Shooting phase, when the bearer's unit is selected as the target of a ranged attack, you can remove the bearer's unit from the battlefield and then set it back up again anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units. If the bearer's unit is no longer an eligible target, your opponent can then select new targets for any attacks that had targeted the bearer's unit.

abilities.name: Driven by Duty
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights Walker^^** model only. Each time the bearer's unit Piles In or Consolidates, the bearer can move up to 6" instead of 3".

abilities.name: Quickening Foci
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights Infantry^^** model only.  In your Movement phase, each time the bearer's unit disembarks from a ^^**Transport**^^, until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that unit.

abilities.name: Spiritus Machina
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights Infantry^^** model only. In your Shooting phase, each time the bearer's unit is selected to shoot, if the bearer's unit disembarked from a ^^**Transport^^** this turn, until the end of the phase, each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Blinding Aura
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. Each time the bearer's unit is set up using the Deep Strike ability, until the end of the turn, enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch ability to shoot at the bearer's unit.

abilities.name: Tome of Forbidden Ways
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield or in Strategic Reserves, add 1 to the number of units from your army that you can select for the Gate of Infinity rule.

abilities.name: Banishing Wave (Psychic)
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only.  Each time the bearer's unit is set up using the Deep Strike ability, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 12" of the bearer: on a 2-5, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 6, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Purity of Purpose
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. Each time the bearer's unit is set up using the Deep Strike ability, until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit.

abilities.name: Pyresoul (Psychic)
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one enemy unit within 24" of and visible to the bearer; that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Ephemeral Tome
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, the bearer's unit can make a Normal Move of up to D6" and, until the end of the turn, the bearer's unit is not eligible to declare a Charge.

abilities.name: Sixty-sixth Seal
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only.  In your Shooting phase, each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abilities.name: Sigil of the Hunt
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. In your Shooting phase, each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: One Foot in the Future
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. Each time the bearer's unit is set up in your Reinforcements step, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, the bearer's unit can make a Normal Move of up to D6", and until the end of the turn, the bearer's unit is not eligible to declare a Charge.

abilities.name: Doomseer's Amulet
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. Each time the bearer's unit is set up in your Reinforcements step, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting one from that test.

abilities.name: Grimoire of Conjunctions
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only.  Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 4 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer.

abilities.name: Shield of Prophecy
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. Once per battle, at the start of the battle round, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the battle round, add 2 to the Toughness characteristic of models in the bearer's unit.

abilities.name: Tactical Haruspexy
abilities.description: Once per battle, when the bearer declares a charge, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, it can select units that are not visible to it as targets of that charge, provided they are within 9" of it.

abilities.name: Sigil of Warding
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the end of your Shooting phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, it can make a Normal move of up to 3" and can then attempt to operate a Hatchway. The bearer is then not eligible to declare a charge this turn.

abilities.name: Close and Sanction
abilities.description: In your opponent's Shooting phase, each time an enemy unit is selected to shoot, after that unit has shot, if the bearer was hit by one or more of those attacks, the bearer can make a Dash move. To do so, roll one D6: the bearer can be moved a distance in inches up to the result, but it must finish that move as close as possible to the closest visible enemy unit. When doing so, it can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. The bearer can only make one Dash move per phase.

abilities.name: Shield of Admonishment
abilities.description: Each time a melee attack targets the bearer, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Fate-woven Knot
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-ready rank or higher. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Battle Honour. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer has a 3+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Scrolls of Prophecy
abilities.description: Model with the Heroic rank or higher. If the bearer is in your Crusade army, then at the Select Crusade Blessings step, if you are the Underdog, you can select one additional Crusade Blessing.

abilities.name: Hour of Need
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-ready rank or higher. If your Crusade army includes the bearer, then at the Determine Attacker and Defender step, do not roll off to determine the Attacker and Defender for that battle. Instead, you choose whether you will be the Attacker. If your opponent has the same or a similar rule to become the Attacker, ignore both rules and instead determine the Attacker and Defender normally.

abilities.name: Augury of Aggression
abilities.description: Model with the Blooded rank or higher. Once per turn, you can target the bearer's unit with the Fire Overwatch or the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP.

abilities.name: Words of the Righteous
abilities.description: Model with the Blooded rank or higher. At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within 3" of the bearer must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test if it is a **^^Chaos^^** unit.

abilities.name: Gem of Inoktu (Psychic)
abilities.description: Model with the Blooded rank or higher. At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. Roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if it is a **^^Chaos^^** unit. On a 4+, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Conjunction Signature
abilities.description: Model with the Heroic rank or higher. You can target the bearer's unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP.

abilities.name: Duty's End
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-hardened rank or higher. If the bearer is destroyed by a melee attack, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, you can roll one D6, adding 2 the result if the attacking unit contains an **^^Epic Hero^^**, **^^Monster^^** or **^^Warlord^^** model: on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 4-5, that enemy suffers 3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Sigil Abnegatos
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-hardened rank or higher. While the bearer is within range of an objective marker that you control, enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of that objective marker.

abilities.name: Portents of Doom
abilities.description: Model with the Heroic rank or higher. Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is a **^^Chaos^^** unit within 12" of the bearer, or if that unit is a non-**^^Chaos^^** unit within 9" of the bearer, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Periclaen Eye
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-hardened rank or higher. Each time a melee attack targets the bearer's unit, if the attacking unit made a Charge move this turn, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Mirror of Sight Denied
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-hardened rank or higher. If your army includes one or more models with this ability, after both players have deployed their armies, select up to three **^^Grey Knights^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Prism of Potential
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-hardened rank or higher. When selecting Agendas for a battle, if the bearer is in your Crusade army, at the Select Agendas step, you can select one additional Grey Knights Agenda.

■ Paladin Squad

abilities.name: Exemplar of the Silvered Host
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, on a Critical Wound, the target suffers 1 mortal wound in addition to any normal damage.

abilities.name: Strands of Fate (Psychic)
abilities.description: The first time this model is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Purgation Squad
■ Strike Squad

abilities.description: Each time this model destroys a Character model in the Fight phase, you gain 1CP and, until the end of the battle, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of its Nemesis force weapon.

abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one enemy unit within 24" of and visible to the bearer; that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Ephemeral Tome
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, the bearer's unit can make a Normal Move of up to D6" and, until the end of the turn, the bearer's unit is not eligible to declare a Charge.

abilities.name: Sixty-sixth Seal
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only.  In your Shooting phase, each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abilities.name: Sigil of the Hunt
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. In your Shooting phase, each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: One Foot in the Future
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. Each time the bearer's unit is set up in your Reinforcements step, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, the bearer's unit can make a Normal Move of up to D6", and until the end of the turn, the bearer's unit is not eligible to declare a Charge.

abilities.name: Doomseer's Amulet
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. Each time the bearer's unit is set up in your Reinforcements step, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting one from that test.

abilities.name: Grimoire of Conjunctions
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only.  Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 4 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer.

abilities.name: Shield of Prophecy
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. Once per battle, at the start of the battle round, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the battle round, add 2 to the Toughness characteristic of models in the bearer's unit.

abilities.name: Tactical Haruspexy
abilities.description: Once per battle, when the bearer declares a charge, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, it can select units that are not visible to it as targets of that charge, provided they are within 9" of it.

abilities.name: Sigil of Warding
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the end of your Shooting phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, it can make a Normal move of up to 3" and can then attempt to operate a Hatchway. The bearer is then not eligible to declare a charge this turn.

abilities.name: Close and Sanction
abilities.description: In your opponent's Shooting phase, each time an enemy unit is selected to shoot, after that unit has shot, if the bearer was hit by one or more of those attacks, the bearer can make a Dash move. To do so, roll one D6: the bearer can be moved a distance in inches up to the result, but it must finish that move as close as possible to the closest visible enemy unit. When doing so, it can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. The bearer can only make one Dash move per phase.

abilities.name: Shield of Admonishment
abilities.description: Each time a melee attack targets the bearer, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Fate-woven Knot
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-ready rank or higher. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Battle Honour. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer has a 3+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Scrolls of Prophecy
abilities.description: Model with the Heroic rank or higher. If the bearer is in your Crusade army, then at the Select Crusade Blessings step, if you are the Underdog, you can select one additional Crusade Blessing.

abilities.name: Hour of Need
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-ready rank or higher. If your Crusade army includes the bearer, then at the Determine Attacker and Defender step, do not roll off to determine the Attacker and Defender for that battle. Instead, you choose whether you will be the Attacker. If your opponent has the same or a similar rule to become the Attacker, ignore both rules and instead determine the Attacker and Defender normally.

abilities.name: Augury of Aggression
abilities.description: Model with the Blooded rank or higher. Once per turn, you can target the bearer's unit with the Fire Overwatch or the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP.

abilities.name: Words of the Righteous
abilities.description: Model with the Blooded rank or higher. At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within 3" of the bearer must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test if it is a **^^Chaos^^** unit.

abilities.name: Gem of Inoktu (Psychic)
abilities.description: Model with the Blooded rank or higher. At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. Roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if it is a **^^Chaos^^** unit. On a 4+, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Conjunction Signature
abilities.description: Model with the Heroic rank or higher. You can target the bearer's unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP.

abilities.name: Duty's End
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-hardened rank or higher. If the bearer is destroyed by a melee attack, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, you can roll one D6, adding 2 the result if the attacking unit contains an **^^Epic Hero^^**, **^^Monster^^** or **^^Warlord^^** model: on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 4-5, that enemy suffers 3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Sigil Abnegatos
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-hardened rank or higher. While the bearer is within range of an objective marker that you control, enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of that objective marker.

abilities.name: Portents of Doom
abilities.description: Model with the Heroic rank or higher. Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is a **^^Chaos^^** unit within 12" of the bearer, or if that unit is a non-**^^Chaos^^** unit within 9" of the bearer, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Periclaen Eye
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-hardened rank or higher. Each time a melee attack targets the bearer's unit, if the attacking unit made a Charge move this turn, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Mirror of Sight Denied
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-hardened rank or higher. abilities.name: Words of the Righteous
abilities.description: Model with the Blooded rank or higher. At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within 3" of the bearer must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test if it is a **^^Chaos^^** unit.

abilities.name: Gem of Inoktu (Psychic)
abilities.description: Model with the Blooded rank or higher. At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. Roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if it is a **^^Chaos^^** unit. On a 4+, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Conjunction Signature
abilities.description: Model with the Heroic rank or higher. You can target the bearer's unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP.

abilities.name: Duty's End
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-hardened rank or higher. If the bearer is destroyed by a melee attack, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, you can roll one D6, adding 2 the result if the attacking unit contains an **^^Epic Hero^^**, **^^Monster^^** or **^^Warlord^^** model: on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 4-5, that enemy suffers 3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Sigil Abnegatos
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-hardened rank or higher. While the bearer is within range of an objective marker that you control, enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of that objective marker.

abilities.name: Portents of Doom
abilities.description: Model with the Heroic rank or higher. Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is a **^^Chaos^^** unit within 12" of the bearer, or if that unit is a non-**^^Chaos^^** unit within 9" of the bearer, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Periclaen Eye
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-hardened rank or higher. Each time a melee attack targets the bearer's unit, if the attacking unit made a Charge move this turn, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Mirror of Sight Denied
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-hardened rank or higher. If your army includes one or more models with this ability, after both players have deployed their armies, select up to three **^^Grey Knights^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Prism of Potential
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-hardened rank or higher. When selecting Agendas for a battle, if the bearer is in your Crusade army, at the Select Agendas step, you can select one additional Grey Knights Agenda.

abilities.name: Force Edge (Psychic)
abilities.description: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack that targets a unit (excluding ^^**Vehicles^^** or ^^**Monsters^^**), improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abilities.name: Ancient's Banner
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit.

abilities.name: Apothecary's narthecium
abilities.description: In your Command phase, if the bearer is not destroyed, you can return 1 destroyed model (excluding ^^**Characters^^**) to the bearer’s unit.

abilities.name: Fate-woven Knot
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-ready rank or higher. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Battle Honour. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer has a 3+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Scrolls of Prophecy
abilities.description: Model with the Heroic rank or higher. If the bearer is in your Crusade army, then at the Select Crusade Blessings step, if you are the Underdog, you can select one additional Crusade Blessing.

abilities.name: Hour of Need
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-ready rank or higher. If your Crusade army includes the bearer, then at the Determine Attacker and Defender step, do not roll off to determine the Attacker and Defender for that battle. Instead, you choose whether you will be the Attacker. If your opponent has the same or a similar rule to become the Attacker, ignore both rules and instead determine the Attacker and Defender normally.

■ Purifier Squad

abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee weapons equipped by this model.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **^^Brotherhood Terminator Squad^^**
- **^^Paladin Squad^^**

abilities.name: Paragon of Sanctity
abilities.description: **^^Grey Knights^^** model only. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can select one friendly **^^Grey Knights^^** unit within 18" of and visible to it. If it does, until the end of the phase, that unit is within your army’s Hallowed Ground.

abilities.name: Phial of the Abyss
abilities.description: **^^Grey Knights Infantry^^** model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Stealth ability.

abilities.name: Mandulian Reliquary
abilities.description: **^^Grey Knights^^** model only. While the bearer’s unit is not Battle‑shocked, add 3 to the bearer’s Objective Control characteristic.

abilities.name: Radiant Champion
abilities.description: **^^Grey Knights Infantry^^** model only. The bearer’s melee weapons have the [^^**Precision**^^] ability, and while the bearer is wholly within your army’s Hallowed Ground, each time a melee attack made by the bearer scores a wound, the target of that attack suffers 1 mortal wound in addition to any normal damage.

abilities.name: Eye of the Augurium
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. Once per battle round, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, you can target the bearer's unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem or Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this turn.

abilities.name: Sanctic Reaper
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights Terminator^^** model only. Add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons.

abilities.name: Inescapable Judgement (Psychic)
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only.  Each time an enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit Falls Back, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds. These mortal wounds are Psychic Attacks.

abilities.name: Nemesis Rounds
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights Terminator^^** model only.  Each time you target the bearer's unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ while resolving that Stratagem.

abilities.name: Sigil of Exigence
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. Once per battle, in your opponent's Shooting phase, when the bearer's unit is selected as the target of a ranged attack, you can remove the bearer's unit from the battlefield and then set it back up again anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units. If the bearer's unit is no longer an eligible target, your opponent can then select new targets for any attacks that had targeted the bearer's unit.

abilities.name: Driven by Duty
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights Walker^^** model only. Each time the bearer's unit Piles In or Consolidates, the bearer can move up to 6" instead of 3".

abilities.name: Quickening Foci
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights Infantry^^** model only.  In your Movement phase, each time the bearer's unit disembarks from a ^^**Transport**^^, until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that unit.

abilities.name: Spiritus Machina
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights Infantry^^** model only. In your Shooting phase, each time the bearer's unit is selected to shoot, if the bearer's unit disembarked from a ^^**Transport^^** this turn, until the end of the phase, each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Blinding Aura
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. Each time the bearer's unit is set up using the Deep Strike ability, until the end of the turn, enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch ability to shoot at the bearer's unit.

abilities.name: Tome of Forbidden Ways
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield or in Strategic Reserves, add 1 to the number of units from your army that you can select for the Gate of Infinity rule.

abilities.name: Banishing Wave (Psychic)
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only.  Each time the bearer's unit is set up using the Deep Strike ability, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 12" of the bearer: on a 2-5, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 6, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Purity of Purpose
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. Each time the bearer's unit is set up using the Deep Strike ability, until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit.

abilities.name: Pyresoul (Psychic)
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one enemy unit within 24" of and visible to the bearer; that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Ephemeral Tome

If it does, the bearer's unit can make a Normal Move of up to D6" and, until the end of the turn, the bearer's unit is not eligible to declare a Charge.

abilities.name: Sixty-sixth Seal
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only.  In your Shooting phase, each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abilities.name: Sigil of the Hunt
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. In your Shooting phase, each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: Duty's End
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-hardened rank or higher. If the bearer is destroyed by a melee attack, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, you can roll one D6, adding 2 the result if the attacking unit contains an **^^Epic Hero^^**, **^^Monster^^** or **^^Warlord^^** model: on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 4-5, that enemy suffers 3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Sigil Abnegatos
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-hardened rank or higher. While the bearer is within range of an objective marker that you control, enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of that objective marker.

abilities.name: Portents of Doom
abilities.description: Model with the Heroic rank or higher. Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is a **^^Chaos^^** unit within 12" of the bearer, or if that unit is a non-**^^Chaos^^** unit within 9" of the bearer, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Periclaen Eye
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-hardened rank or higher. Each time a melee attack targets the bearer's unit, if the attacking unit made a Charge move this turn, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Mirror of Sight Denied
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-hardened rank or higher. If your army includes one or more models with this ability, after both players have deployed their armies, select up to three **^^Grey Knights^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Prism of Potential
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-hardened rank or higher. When selecting Agendas for a battle, if the bearer is in your Crusade army, at the Select Agendas step, you can select one additional Grey Knights Agenda.

abilities.name: Sanctuary (Psychic)
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Hammer Aflame (Psychic)
abilities.description: Each time this model’s unit is selected to fight, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model’s unit and roll one D6: on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Brotherhood Terminator Squad
■ Paladin Squad

units.name: Land Raider

abilities.name: Assault Ramp
abilities.description: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

abilities.name: Fate-woven Knot
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-ready rank or higher. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Battle Honour. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer has a 3+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Scrolls of Prophecy
abilities.description: Model with the Heroic rank or higher. If the bearer is in your Crusade army, then at the Select Crusade Blessings step, if you are the Underdog, you can select one additional Crusade Blessing.

abilities.name: Hour of Need
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-ready rank or higher. If your Crusade army includes the bearer, then at the Determine Attacker and Defender step, do not roll off to determine the Attacker and Defender for that battle. Instead, you choose whether you will be the Attacker. If your opponent has the same or a similar rule to become the Attacker, ignore both rules and instead determine the Attacker and Defender normally.

abilities.name: Augury of Aggression
abilities.description: Model with the Blooded rank or higher. Once per turn, you can target the bearer's unit with the Fire Overwatch or the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP.

abilities.name: Words of the Righteous
abilities.description: Model with the Blooded rank or higher. At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within 3" of the bearer must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test if it is a **^^Chaos^^** unit.

abilities.name: Gem of Inoktu (Psychic)
abilities.description: Model with the Blooded rank or higher. At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. Roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if it is a **^^Chaos^^** unit. On a 4+, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

If the bearer is destroyed by a melee attack, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, you can roll one D6, adding 2 the result if the attacking unit contains an **^^Epic Hero^^**, **^^Monster^^** or **^^Warlord^^** model: on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 4-5, that enemy suffers 3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Sigil Abnegatos
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-hardened rank or higher. While the bearer is within range of an objective marker that you control, enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of that objective marker.

abilities.name: Portents of Doom
abilities.description: Model with the Heroic rank or higher. Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is a **^^Chaos^^** unit within 12" of the bearer, or if that unit is a non-**^^Chaos^^** unit within 9" of the bearer, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Periclaen Eye
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-hardened rank or higher. Each time a melee attack targets the bearer's unit, if the attacking unit made a Charge move this turn, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Mirror of Sight Denied
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-hardened rank or higher. If your army includes one or more models with this ability, after both players have deployed their armies, select up to three **^^Grey Knights^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Prism of Potential
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-hardened rank or higher. When selecting Agendas for a battle, if the bearer is in your Crusade army, at the Select Agendas step, you can select one additional Grey Knights Agenda.

units.transportCapacity: This model has a transport capacity of 12 ^^**Grey Knights Infantry^^** models and 1 ^^**Grey Knights Venerable Dreadnought^^** model. Each ^^**Terminator^^** model takes up the space of 2 models.

abilities.name: Strafing Run
abilities.description: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that cannot ^^**Fly^^**, add 1 to the Hit roll

abilities.name: Fate-woven Knot
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-ready rank or higher. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Battle Honour. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer has a 3+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Scrolls of Prophecy
abilities.description: Model with the Heroic rank or higher. If the bearer is in your Crusade army, then at the Select Crusade Blessings step, if you are the Underdog, you can select one additional Crusade Blessing.

abilities.name: Hour of Need
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-ready rank or higher. If your Crusade army includes the bearer, then at the Determine Attacker and Defender step, do not roll off to determine the Attacker and Defender for that battle. Instead, you choose whether you will be the Attacker. If your opponent has the same or a similar rule to become the Attacker, ignore both rules and instead determine the Attacker and Defender normally.

abilities.description: Model with the Blooded rank or higher. Once per turn, you can target the bearer's unit with the Fire Overwatch or the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP.

abilities.name: Paragon of Sanctity
abilities.description: **^^Grey Knights^^** model only. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can select one friendly **^^Grey Knights^^** unit within 18" of and visible to it. If it does, until the end of the phase, that unit is within your army’s Hallowed Ground.

abilities.name: Phial of the Abyss
abilities.description: **^^Grey Knights Infantry^^** model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Stealth ability.

abilities.name: Mandulian Reliquary
abilities.description: **^^Grey Knights^^** model only. While the bearer’s unit is not Battle‑shocked, add 3 to the bearer’s Objective Control characteristic.

abilities.name: Radiant Champion
abilities.description: **^^Grey Knights Infantry^^** model only. The bearer’s melee weapons have the [^^**Precision**^^] ability, and while the bearer is wholly within your army’s Hallowed Ground, each time a melee attack made by the bearer scores a wound, the target of that attack suffers 1 mortal wound in addition to any normal damage.

abilities.name: Eye of the Augurium
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. Once per battle round, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, you can target the bearer's unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem or Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this turn.

abilities.name: Sanctic Reaper
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights Terminator^^** model only. Add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons.

abilities.name: Inescapable Judgement (Psychic)
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only.  Each time an enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit Falls Back, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds. These mortal wounds are Psychic Attacks.

abilities.name: Nemesis Rounds
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights Terminator^^** model only.  Each time you target the bearer's unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ while resolving that Stratagem.

abilities.name: Sigil of Exigence
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. Once per battle, in your opponent's Shooting phase, when the bearer's unit is selected as the target of a ranged attack, you can remove the bearer's unit from the battlefield and then set it back up again anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units. If the bearer's unit is no longer an eligible target, your opponent can then select new targets for any attacks that had targeted the bearer's unit.

abilities.name: Driven by Duty
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights Walker^^** model only. Each time the bearer's unit Piles In or Consolidates, the bearer can move up to 6" instead of 3".

abilities.name: Quickening Foci
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights Infantry^^** model only.  In your Movement phase, each time the bearer's unit disembarks from a ^^**Transport**^^, until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that unit.

abilities.name: Spiritus Machina
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights Infantry^^** model only. In your Shooting phase, each time the bearer's unit is selected to shoot, if the bearer's unit disembarked from a ^^**Transport^^** this turn, until the end of the phase, each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Blinding Aura
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. Each time the bearer's unit is set up using the Deep Strike ability, until the end of the turn, enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch ability to shoot at the bearer's unit.

abilities.name: Tome of Forbidden Ways
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield or in Strategic Reserves, add 1 to the number of units from your army that you can select for the Gate of Infinity rule.

abilities.name: Banishing Wave (Psychic)
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only.  Each time the bearer's unit is set up using the Deep Strike ability, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 12" of the bearer: on a 2-5, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 6, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Purity of Purpose
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. Each time the bearer's unit is set up using the Deep Strike ability, until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit.

abilities.name: Pyresoul (Psychic)
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one enemy unit within 24" of and visible to the bearer; that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Ephemeral Tome
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, the bearer's unit can make a Normal Move of up to D6" and, until the end of the turn, the bearer's unit is not eligible to declare a Charge.

abilities.name: Sixty-sixth Seal
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only.  In your Shooting phase, each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abilities.name: Sigil of the Hunt
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. In your Shooting phase, each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: One Foot in the Future
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. Each time the bearer's unit is set up in your Reinforcements step, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, the bearer's unit can make a Normal Move of up to D6", and until the end of the turn, the bearer's unit is not eligible to declare a Charge.

abilities.name: Doomseer's Amulet
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. Each time the bearer's unit is set up in your Reinforcements step, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting one from that test.

abilities.name: Grimoire of Conjunctions
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only.  Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 4 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer.

abilities.name: Shield of Prophecy
abilities.description: ^^**Grey Knights^^** model only. Once per battle, at the start of the battle round, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the battle round, add 2 to the Toughness characteristic of models in the bearer's unit.

abilities.name: Tactical Haruspexy
abilities.description: Once per battle, when the bearer declares a charge, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, it can select units that are not visible to it as targets of that charge, provided they are within 9" of it.

abilities.name: Sigil of Warding
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the end of your Shooting phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, it can make a Normal move of up to 3" and can then attempt to operate a Hatchway. The bearer is then not eligible to declare a charge this turn.

abilities.name: Close and Sanction
abilities.description: In your opponent's Shooting phase, each time an enemy unit is selected to shoot, after that unit has shot, if the bearer was hit by one or more of those attacks, the bearer can make a Dash move. To do so, roll one D6: the bearer can be moved a distance in inches up to the result, but it must finish that move as close as possible to the closest visible enemy unit. When doing so, it can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. The bearer can only make one Dash move per phase.

abilities.name: Shield of Admonishment
abilities.description: Each time a melee attack targets the bearer, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Personal Teleporters
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6" as if it were your Movement phase. If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is a **^^Chaos^^** unit within 12" of the bearer, or if that unit is a non-**^^Chaos^^** unit within 9" of the bearer, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Periclaen Eye
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-hardened rank or higher. Each time a melee attack targets the bearer's unit, if the attacking unit made a Charge move this turn, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Mirror of Sight Denied
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-hardened rank or higher. If your army includes one or more models with this ability, after both players have deployed their armies, select up to three **^^Grey Knights^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Prism of Potential
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-hardened rank or higher. When selecting Agendas for a battle, if the bearer is in your Crusade army, at the Select Agendas step, you can select one additional Grey Knights Agenda.

abilities.name: Righteous Persecution
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding ^^**Monsters^^** or ^^**Vehicles^^**) hit by one or more of those attacks; until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2 from that unit's Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

abilities.name: Fate-woven Knot
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-ready rank or higher. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Battle Honour. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer has a 3+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Scrolls of Prophecy
abilities.description: Model with the Heroic rank or higher. If the bearer is in your Crusade army, then at the Select Crusade Blessings step, if you are the Underdog, you can select one additional Crusade Blessing.

abilities.name: Hour of Need
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-ready rank or higher. If your Crusade army includes the bearer, then at the Determine Attacker and Defender step, do not roll off to determine the Attacker and Defender for that battle. Instead, you choose whether you will be the Attacker. If your opponent has the same or a similar rule to become the Attacker, ignore both rules and instead determine the Attacker and Defender normally.

abilities.name: Augury of Aggression
abilities.description: Model with the Blooded rank or higher. Once per turn, you can target the bearer's unit with the Fire Overwatch or the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP.

abilities.name: Words of the Righteous
abilities.description: Model with the Blooded rank or higher. At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within 3" of the bearer must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test if it is a **^^Chaos^^** unit.

abilities.name: Gem of Inoktu (Psychic)
abilities.description: Model with the Blooded rank or higher. At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. Roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if it is a **^^Chaos^^** unit. On a 4+, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Conjunction Signature
abilities.description: Model with the Heroic rank or higher. You can target the bearer's unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP.

abilities.name: Duty's End
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-hardened rank or higher. If the bearer is destroyed by a melee attack, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, you can roll one D6, adding 2 the result if the attacking unit contains an **^^Epic Hero^^**, **^^Monster^^** or **^^Warlord^^** model: on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 4-5, that enemy suffers 3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Prism of Potential
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-hardened rank or higher. When selecting Agendas for a battle, if the bearer is in your Crusade army, at the Select Agendas step, you can select one additional Grey Knights Agenda.

units.name: Grey Knights Relic Razorback [Legends]

abilities.name: Fire Support
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit it scored one or more hits against this phase. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this Transport this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Fate-woven Knot
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-ready rank or higher. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Battle Honour. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer has a 3+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Scrolls of Prophecy
abilities.description: Model with the Heroic rank or higher. If the bearer is in your Crusade army, then at the Select Crusade Blessings step, if you are the Underdog, you can select one additional Crusade Blessing.

abilities.name: Hour of Need
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-ready rank or higher. If your Crusade army includes the bearer, then at the Determine Attacker and Defender step, do not roll off to determine the Attacker and Defender for that battle. Instead, you choose whether you will be the Attacker. If your opponent has the same or a similar rule to become the Attacker, ignore both rules and instead determine the Attacker and Defender normally.

abilities.name: Augury of Aggression
abilities.description: Model with the Blooded rank or higher. Once per turn, you can target the bearer's unit with the Fire Overwatch or the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP.

abilities.name: Words of the Righteous
abilities.description: Model with the Blooded rank or higher. At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within 3" of the bearer must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test if it is a **^^Chaos^^** unit.

abilities.name: Gem of Inoktu (Psychic)
abilities.description: Model with the Blooded rank or higher. At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. Roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if it is a **^^Chaos^^** unit. On a 4+, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Conjunction Signature
abilities.description: Model with the Heroic rank or higher. You can target the bearer's unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP.

abilities.name: Duty's End
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-hardened rank or higher. If the bearer is destroyed by a melee attack, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, you can roll one D6, adding 2 the result if the attacking unit contains an **^^Epic Hero^^**, **^^Monster^^** or **^^Warlord^^** model: on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 4-5, that enemy suffers 3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Sigil Abnegatos
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-hardened rank or higher. While the bearer is within range of an objective marker that you control, enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of that objective marker.

abilities.name: Portents of Doom
abilities.description: Model with the Heroic rank or higher. Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is a **^^Chaos^^** unit within 12" of the bearer, or if that unit is a non-**^^Chaos^^** unit within 9" of the bearer, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Periclaen Eye
abilities.description: Model with the Battle-hardened rank or higher. Each time a melee attack targets the bearer's unit, if the attacking unit made a Charge move this turn, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
